_meta.title: FF Load
_meta.note: video is patched with an annotated path: '<subfolder>/<file>.mp4 [output]' to read from the ComfyUI output dir

_meta.title: FF Upscale
_meta.note: VALIDATED live 2026-07-14 against 192.168.4.196:8188/object_info/FlashVSRNode: frames IMAGE link; model enum [FlashVSR, FlashVSR-v1.1] default FlashVSR-v1.1; mode enum [tiny, tiny-long, full] default tiny; scale INT 2-4; tiled_vae/tiled_dit/unload_dit BOOLEAN; seed INT 0-1125899906842624. Output 0 = IMAGE. Advanced variant is FlashVSRNodeAdv (+FlashVSRInitPipe) if tile_size/sparse_ratio control is needed. Weights (verified in pack nodes.py init_pipeline): the selected model name maps 1:1 to huggingface repo JunhaoZhuang/<model> snapshot_download'ed into models/<model> — so FlashVSR-v1.1 lands in models/FlashVSR-v1.1 (~2.8GB: diffusion_pytorch_model_streaming_dmd.safetensors, Wan2.1_VAE.pth, LQ_proj_in.ckpt, TCDecoder.ckpt). AUTO-DOWNLOADS on FIRST run (resume-capable); no files need pre-exist — the first review job just blocks during the download. Behavior notes from source: frame-count preserving (pads input to 8n+5 with repeated last frame, trims back), and with tiled_dit=true the 256px tiles are exact 128-multiples at every scale so output is exactly input×scale (no center-crop); simple node runs fp16, color_fix on, force_offload on.

_meta.title: FF Output
_meta.note: frame_rate and filename_prefix are BOTH patched per job by /api/finish (frame_rate must match the input clip's fps — 32 for RIFE'd Wan finals, 16 raw Wan, 24 LTX Flash).
